info.title: GetYourToursMauritius API
info.description: API-first backend for Belle Mare Tours — catalogue, availability, bookings, payments and the AI assistant. The same token-authenticated API serves web and mobile clients.

get.summary: Search the published tour & transport catalogue
Get full activity detail by slug
List bookable occurrences with live seats_left

post.summary: Create a payment_pending booking (prices come from the DB)
Create a payment + hosted-checkout link for a booking

get.summary: The OpenAPI 3.1 specification for this API

bearerAuth.description: Supabase access token (JWT) from the Authorization header.
